question: What is the full name of the fund with ticker VTI?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN f.name AS name

question: Which is the security exchange that VTI is listed on?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN f.securityExchange AS exchange

question: What is the expense ratio for VTI?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN f.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio

question: How many holdings does the fund VTI have in total?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN count(h) AS holdingsCount, f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName

question: What is the turnover rate for VTI?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN f.turnoverRate AS turnoverRate

question: What are the advisory fees for VTI?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN f.advisoryFees AS advisoryFees

question: Calculate the cost per 10k investment for VTI.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN f.costsPer10k AS cost

question: Find the ticker symbol for the fund named 'Vanguard Total Stock Market Index Fund'.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {name: 'Vanguard Total Stock Market Index Fund'}) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker

question: Which Trust issues the fund VTI?
expected_cypher: MATCH (t:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN t.name AS trustName

question: Who is the provider that manages the VTI fund?
expected_cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN p.name AS providerName

question: What share class does VTI belong to?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_SHARE_CLASS]->(sc:ShareClass) RETURN sc.name AS shareClass

question: Get the description of the share class for VTI.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_SHARE_CLASS]->(sc:ShareClass) RETURN sc.description AS description

question: Return both the expense ratio and the turnover rate for VTI.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN f.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, f.turnoverRate AS turnoverRate

question: What is the net assets value recorded for the fund VTI?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN f.netAssets

question: List the tickers of all funds managed by the provider 'Vanguard'.
expected_cypher: MATCH (p:Provider {name: 'The Vanguard Group, Inc'})-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) RETURN f.ticker

question: Find all funds with an expense ratio less than 0.05.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE f.expenseRatio < 0.05 RETURN f.name AS name

question: What is the security exchange and the number of holdings for VTI?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN f.securityExchange AS exchange, f.numberHoldings AS holdings

question: Does VTI have a turnover rate higher than 10%?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN f.turnoverRate > 10 AS isHighTurnover

question: Which funds are issued by 'Vanguard Index Funds' trust?
expected_cypher: MATCH (t:Trust {name: 'Vanguard Index Funds'})-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) RETURN f.name AS fundName

question: Retrieve the full metadata (name, exchange, expense ratio) for VTI.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN f.name AS name, f.securityExchange AS exchange, f.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio

question: What is the total number of holdings for the Vanguard Small Cap Fund?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE f.ticker = 'VSCPX' AND f.numberHoldings IS NOT NULL RETURN DISTINCT f.numberHoldings AS totalHoldings, f.name, f.ticker

question: Show me the costs per 10k for all funds listed on NASDAQ.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE f.securityExchange = 'NASDAQ' RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.costsPer10k AS cost

question: Who manages the trust for the fund with turnover rate 4%?
expected_cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) WHERE f.turnoverRate = 4 RETURN p.name AS providerName

question: Are there any funds with more than 5000 holdings?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE f.numberHoldings > 5000 RETURN f.name AS fundName

question: Who are the managers of the Vanguard Mid Cap Growth fund?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VMGRX'})-[:MANAGED_BY]->(p:Person) RETURN p.name AS managerName, f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName

question: What was the return of the year 2016 of the VFINX fund?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VFINX'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT {year: 2016}]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn

question: What is the investment objective text for Vanguard S&P 500 fund?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VFFSX'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_OBJECTIVE_CHUNK]->(o:Objective) RETURN o.text AS objective

question: What is the investment objective text for VOO?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_OBJECTIVE_CHUNK]->(o:Objective) RETURN o.text AS objective

question: What are the main risks described for VTI?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_RISK_CHUNK]->(r:RiskChunk) RETURN r.title AS riskTitle, r.text AS riskDescription

question: Get the performance commentary for VTI.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_PERFORMANCE_COMMENTARY_CHUNK]->(pc:PerformanceCommentary) RETURN pc.text AS performance

question: What charts are available for VTI?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_CHART]->(img:Image) RETURN img.title AS chartTitle, img.category AS category, img.svg AS svg

question: What are the top 5 holdings for VTI?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN h.name AS holdingName, r.weight AS weight ORDER BY r.weight DESC LIMIT 5

question: Show me what is the 1y, 5y and inception return of the VTI fund?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) RETURN ar.return1y AS oneYear, ar.return5y AS fiveYear, ar.returnInception AS inception

question: What is the name of the fund that has the greatest annual returns since inception?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) RETURN f.name AS fundName, ar.returnInception AS inceptionReturn ORDER BY inceptionReturn DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the provider managing funds with the lowest average turnover rate.
expected_cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) WITH p, avg(f.turnoverRate) AS avgTurnover RETURN p.name AS provider, avgTurnover ORDER BY avgTurnover ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which holding has the highest weight across all portfolios?
expected_cypher: MATCH (:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN h.name AS holdingName, h.ticker AS ticker, max(r.weight) AS maxWeight ORDER BY maxWeight DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all funds that share at least one manager with VTI.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f1:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:MANAGED_BY]->(p:Person)<-[:MANAGED_BY]-(f2:Fund) WHERE f1 <> f2 RETURN DISTINCT f2.ticker AS ticker, f2.name AS name, p.name AS sharedManager

question: Show me the tickers of the Vanguard Total Stock Market and the main information about each one of them
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {name: 'Vanguard Total Stock Market Index Fund'}) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS name, f.securityExchange AS exchange, f.costsPer10k AS cost, f.advisoryFees AS fee, f.numberHoldings AS holdings, f.expenseRatio AS ratio, f.netAssets AS assets, f.turnoverRate AS turnover

question: Show me all of the different sectors that exist in the database
expected_cypher: MATCH (s:Sector) RETURN DISTINCT s.name AS sectorName

question: Show me the ordered list of funds in decreasing order of the 5 year returns
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE ar.return5y IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, ar.return5y AS fiveYearReturn ORDER BY fiveYearReturn DESC

question: Show me the fund that has the best total return in the year 2022
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL AND r.year = 2022 RETURN f.name AS fundName, r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn ORDER BY totalReturn DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the risks of the fund VTI?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_RISK_CHUNK]->(r:RiskChunk) RETURN r.text AS risk

expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_STRATEGY_CHUNK]->(s:StrategyChunk) RETURN s.text AS strategy

expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[h:HAS_REGION_ALLOCATION]->(:Region {name: 'United States'}) WHERE h.weight > 15.0 RETURN f.name AS fundName

question: What is the name of the fund that has the greatest annual returns since inception?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) RETURN f.name AS fundName, ar.returnInception AS inceptionReturn ORDER BY inceptionReturn DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the provider managing funds with the lowest average turnover rate.
expected_cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) WITH p, avg(f.turnoverRate) AS avgTurnover RETURN p.name AS provider, avgTurnover ORDER BY avgTurnover ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which holding has the highest weight across all portfolios?
expected_cypher: MATCH (:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN h.name AS holdingName, h.ticker AS ticker, max(r.weight) AS maxWeight ORDER BY maxWeight DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all funds that share at least one manager with VOO.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f1:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:MANAGED_BY]->(p:Person)<-[:MANAGED_BY]-(f2:Fund) WHERE f1 <> f2 RETURN DISTINCT f2.ticker AS ticker, f2.name AS name, p.name AS sharedManager

question: What percentage of AGZ's holdings are US-based companies?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'AGZ'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WITH count(h) AS total, count(CASE WHEN h.country = 'US' THEN 1 END) AS usCount RETURN (usCount * 100.0 / total) AS percentageUS

question: Show me the tickers of the 'S&P 500' related funds and the main information about each one of them
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'S&P 500' RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS name, f.securityExchange AS exchange, f.costsPer10k AS cost, f.advisoryFees AS fee, f.numberHoldings AS holdings, f.expenseRatio AS ratio, f.netAssets AS assets, f.turnoverRate AS turnover

question: Show me the ordered list of funds in decreasing order of the 10 year returns
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE ar.return10y IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, ar.return10y AS tenYearReturn ORDER BY tenYearReturn DESC

question: Show me the fund that has the best total return in the year 2023
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL AND r.year = 2023 RETURN f.name AS fundName, r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn ORDER BY totalReturn DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the risks for the Real Estate ETF?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_RISK_CHUNK]->(r:RiskChunk) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Real Estate' RETURN r.text AS risk

question: What are the strategies of the fund utilities index fund?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_STRATEGY_CHUNK]->(s:StrategyChunk) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Utilities Index Fund' RETURN s.text AS strategy

question: Show me all the funds that are Admiral Shares share class?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_SHARE_CLASS]->(:ShareClass {name: 'Admiral Shares'}) RETURN f.name AS fundName

question: Show me all the funds that have more than 15% invested in Technology
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[h:HAS_SECTOR_ALLOCATION]->(:Sector {name: 'Technology'}) WHERE h.weight > 15.0 RETURN f.name AS fundName

question: Show me the most relevant information about the VIG fund
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VIG'}) RETURN f.name AS fundName, f.securityExchange AS exchange, f.costsPer10k AS cost, f.advisoryFees AS fee, f.numberHoldings AS holdings, f.expenseRatio AS ratio, f.netAssets AS assets, f.turnoverRate AS turnover

question: Does the VOO have any image attached to it?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:HAS_CHART]->(img:Image) RETURN img.title AS chartTitle, img.category AS category

question: For the last financial highlight of the VBK, I want to know the NAV, the expense ratio and the income ratio
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VBK'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS nav, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.netIncomeRatio AS incomeRatio, r.year AS year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the VIEIX, I want to see the evolution of the turnover ratio along the years
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VIEIX'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN fh.turnover AS turnover, r.year AS year ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: How much has the VIEIX fund increased its price since 2 years ago
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VIEIX'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssetsValueBeginning IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueBeginning AS netAssetValue ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Show me the year-over-year NAV end values for the Vanguard Total Bond Market fund
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE toLower(f.name) CONTAINS 'total bond market' AND fh.netAssetsValueEnd IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS navEnd ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Show me the net asset value at the beginning and end of each year for VTI
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssetsValueBeginning IS NOT NULL AND fh.netAssetsValueEnd IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueBeginning AS navBeginning, fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS navEnd ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Get the total return and expense ratio for each year for the VFIAX fund
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VFIAX'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Show me the historical net assets and turnover for VOO over the years
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssets IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.netAssets AS netAssets, fh.turnover AS turnover ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Get the total return percentage for each year for the S&P 500 index fund
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE f.ticker = 'IVV' AND fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: What is the fund that holds the most shares of the AAPL company?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding {ticker: 'AAPL'}) RETURN f.name AS fundName, r.shares AS shares ORDER BY r.shares DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the fund that has the highest turnover rate?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) RETURN f.name AS fundName, f.turnoverRate AS turnoverRate ORDER BY turnoverRate DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the risk factors mentioned in the 10-K filing for Apple?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[:HAS_FILING]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_RISK_FACTOR_CHUNK]->(rf:Section:RiskFactor) RETURN rf.text AS riskFactor LIMIT 10

question: Show me all the insider transactions for Microsoft
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'MSFT'})-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction)-[:MADE_BY]->(p:Person) RETURN p.name AS insiderName, it.transactionDate AS date, it.transactionType AS type, it.shares AS shares, it.price AS price, it.value AS value, it.position AS position ORDER BY it.transactionDate DESC

question: What is the business description from the 10-K filing for the company with ticker GOOG?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'GOOG'})-[:HAS_FILING]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_BUSINESS_INFORMATION_CHUNK]->(bi:Section:BusinessInformation) RETURN bi.text AS businessInfo LIMIT 5

question: What is the region distribution of the Vanguard Energy fund.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_REGION_ALLOCATION]->(g:Region) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Vanguard Energy' RETURN g.name AS region, r.weight AS weight ORDER BY r.weight DESC

question: What sectors does the VGT fund invest in and what are their weights?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VGT'})-[r:HAS_SECTOR_ALLOCATION]->(s:Sector) RETURN s.name AS sector, r.weight AS weight ORDER BY r.weight DESC

question: Which funds hold shares of both Apple and Microsoft?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(:Holding)-[:REPRESENTS]->(c1:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'}), (p)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(:Holding)-[:REPRESENTS]->(c2:Company {ticker: 'MSFT'}) RETURN DISTINCT f.name AS FundName, f.ticker AS FundTicker ORDER BY FundName ASC

question: What is the total market value of all holdings in the VTI portfolio?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN sum(r.marketValue) AS totalMarketValue

question: Show me the financial metrics from the latest 10-K filing for Tesla
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})-[rel:HAS_FILING]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric) RETURN m.label AS metric, m.value AS value ORDER BY rel.date DESC

question: Which documents were used as sources for the VTI fund data?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) RETURN d.accessionNumber AS accession, d.url AS url, d.type AS type, d.filingDate AS filingDate

question: Compare the expense ratios of all ETF share class funds
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_SHARE_CLASS]->(:ShareClass {name: 'ETF Shares'}) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, f.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio ORDER BY f.expenseRatio ASC

question: What is the average expense ratio across all funds managed by Vanguard?
expected_cypher: MATCH (p:Provider {name: 'The Vanguard Group, Inc'})-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) RETURN avg(f.expenseRatio) AS avgExpenseRatio

question: Show me the revenue segments from the 10-K financials of Amazon
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AMZN'})-[:HAS_FILING]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:Segment) RETURN m.label AS metric, s.label AS segment, s.value AS value, s.percentage AS percentage

question: Which fund has the best 1-year return among Index funds?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Index Fund' AND ar.return1y IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, ar.return1y AS oneYearReturn ORDER BY ar.return1y DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many different trusts does Vanguard manage?
expected_cypher: MATCH (p:Provider {name: 'The Vanguard Group, Inc'})-[:MANAGES]->(t:Trust) RETURN count(t) AS trustCount

question: What is the biggest holding in VOO by weight?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN h.name, r.weight ORDER BY r.weight DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which sector has the largest allocation in VGT?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VGT'})-[r:HAS_SECTOR_ALLOCATION]->(s:Sector) RETURN s.name, r.weight ORDER BY r.weight DESC LIMIT 1

question: What regions does GLOF invest in?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'GLOF'})-[r:HAS_REGION_ALLOCATION]->(re:Region) RETURN re.name AS region, r.weight AS weight ORDER BY r.weight DESC

question: What was VTI's worst year in terms of total return?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL RETURN r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn ORDER BY totalReturn ASC LIMIT 1

question: Has anyone sold shares of Tesla recently?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction)-[:MADE_BY]->(p:Person) WHERE it.transactionType = 'Sell' RETURN p.name, it.transactionDate AS date, it.shares, it.price, it.value ORDER BY it.transactionDate DESC

question: Which funds have grown their net assets the most over the last 3 years?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssetsValueEnd IS NOT NULL WITH f, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS nav ORDER BY year DESC  WITH f, collect({year: year, nav: nav}) AS history WHERE size(history) >= 4 AND history[3].nav > 0 RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, history[0].nav AS latestNav, history[3].nav AS threeYearsAgoNav, ((history[0].nav - history[3].nav) / history[3].nav) * 100 AS percentageGrowth ORDER BY percentageGrowth DESC LIMIT 5

question: How much does it cost me to invest 10k in VYM?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VYM'}) RETURN f.costsPer10k AS costPer10k

question: Compare the 10-year average returns of the Vanguard Growth Index Fund versus the Vanguard Value Index Fund.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE f.name IN ['Vanguard Growth Index Fund', 'Vanguard Value Index Fund'] AND ar.return10y IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS FundName, ar.return10y AS Return10Year ORDER BY FundName

question: Which fund has the highest concentration (largest weight) in a single holding?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN f.name AS FundName, h.name AS HoldingName, r.weight AS Weight ORDER BY r.weight DESC LIMIT 1

question: Are there any funds in the database that hold Level 3 (highly illiquid / hard-to-value) fair value assets?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WHERE r.fairValueLevel IN [3, '3', 'Level 3'] RETURN DISTINCT f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, f.netAssets AS netAssets, h.name AS holdingName, r.fairValueLevel AS fairValueLevel

question: What is the stated investment objective of the iShares Energy Storage & Materials ETF?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_OBJECTIVE_CHUNK]->(o:Objective) WHERE toLower(f.name) CONTAINS 'energy storage & materials' RETURN f.name AS FundName, o.text AS Objective

question: Summarize the principal investment strategy for the Vanguard Dividend Appreciation Fund.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_STRATEGY_CHUNK]->(s:StrategyChunk) WHERE toLower(f.name) CONTAINS 'dividend appreciation' RETURN f.name AS FundName, s.text AS Strategy

question: Which company reported the highest total Revenue in their most recent fiscal year?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_FILING]->(f10k:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric {label: 'Revenue'}) RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, fin.fiscalYear AS FiscalYear, m.value AS Revenue ORDER BY m.value DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the Net Profit Margin for Tesla (TSLA) based on its latest income statement?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})-[:HAS_FILING]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(mNet:FinancialMetric {label: 'NetIncome'}) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(mRev:FinancialMetric {label: 'Revenue'}) RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, fin.fiscalYear AS FiscalYear, (mNet.value / mRev.value) * 100 AS NetProfitMarginPercent ORDER BY fin.fiscalYear DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which companies had the highest number of insider 'SELL' transactions?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction) WHERE toUpper(it.transactionType) = 'SELL' RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, count(it) AS BuyCount ORDER BY BuyCount DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which companies had the highest number of insider 'SELL' transactions?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction) WHERE toUpper(it.transactionType) = 'SELL' RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, count(it) AS BuyCount ORDER BY BuyCount DESC LIMIT 5

question: Show me all insider transactions (buys, sells, and tax withholding) made by Mark Zuckerberg.
expected_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:MADE_BY]-(it:InsiderTransaction)<-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]-(c:Company) WHERE toLower(p.name) CONTAINS 'zuckerberg' RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, it.transactionType AS TransactionType, it.shares AS Shares, it.price AS Price, it.transactionDate AS TransactionDate ORDER BY it.transactionDate DESC

question: Which holding appears in the most fund portfolios across the entire database?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN h.ticker AS ticker, h.name AS holdingName, count(DISTINCT f) AS fundCount ORDER BY fundCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Compare the 10-year average returns of the Vanguard Growth Index Fund versus the Vanguard Value Index Fund.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f1:Fund {name: 'Vanguard Growth Index Fund'})-[r1:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar1:AverageReturns) MATCH (f2:Fund {name: 'Vanguard Value Index Fund'})-[r2:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar2:AverageReturns) RETURN f1.name, ar1.return10y, f2.name, ar2.return10y

question: I want to invest safely, which fund has the lowest turnover?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE f.turnoverRate IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name, f.turnoverRate ORDER BY f.turnoverRate ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the top 5 common holdings between VTI and VOO by combined weight?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f1:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[w1:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding)<-[w2:HAS_HOLDING]-(:Portfolio)<-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]-(f2:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'}) RETURN h.ticker AS holdingTicker, h.name AS holdingName, (w1.weight + w2.weight) AS combinedWeight ORDER BY combinedWeight DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which fund is managed by the highest number of people?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:MANAGED_BY]->(p:Person) RETURN f.name AS fundName, count(DISTINCT p) AS managerCount ORDER BY managerCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all funds that have more than 20% allocated to the 'Technology' sector.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[s:HAS_SECTOR_ALLOCATION]->(:Sector {name: 'Technology'}) WHERE s.weight > 20.0 RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName

question: What is the average total return for VOO across all available years in its financial highlights?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL RETURN avg(fh.totalReturn) AS averageTotalReturn

question: Find all funds that have a higher 1-year return than VOO.
expected_cypher: MATCH (voo:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(pVOO:AverageReturns), (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(p:AverageReturns) WHERE f.ticker <> 'VOO' AND p.return1y > pVOO.return1y RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, p.return1y AS fundReturn, pVOO.return1y AS vooReturn ORDER BY fundReturn DESC

question: Show me funds with an expense ratio under 0.05 that have a 5-year return greater than 10%.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(p:AverageReturns) WHERE f.expenseRatio < 0.05 AND p.return5y > 10.0 RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, p.return5y AS return5y ORDER BY return5y DESC

question: Return the net assets and total number of holdings for the Vanguard Dividend Appreciation fund.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Dividend Appreciation' RETURN f.name AS Name, f.netAssets AS netAssets, f.numberHoldings AS totalHoldings

question: Which holding appears in the most fund portfolios across the entire database?
expected_cypher: MATCH (:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN h.ticker AS ticker, h.name AS holdingName, count(*) AS appearanceCount ORDER BY appearanceCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the years where VTI had a negative total return.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn < 0 RETURN r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn ORDER BY year DESC

question: What does the management discussion say about Tesla's outlook in its latest 10-K?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})-[:HAS_FILING]->(f:Filing10K)-[:HAS_MANAGEMENT_DISCUSSION_CHUNK]->(md:Section:ManagemetDiscussion) RETURN md.text AS managementDiscussion LIMIT 5

question: Are there any legal proceedings mentioned in Apple's 10-K filing?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[:HAS_FILING]->(f:Filing10K)-[:HAS_LEGAL_PROCEEDING_CHUNK]->(lp:Section:LegalProceeding) RETURN lp.text AS legalProceedings

question: What properties does Microsoft own according to its 10-K?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'MSFT'})-[:HAS_FILING]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_PROPERTIES_CHUNK]->(props:Section:Properties) RETURN props.fullText AS properties

question: What is the total compensation package for the CEO of Apple?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person)-[:RECEIVED_COMPENSATION]->(cp:CompensationPackage) RETURN p.name AS ceoName, cp.totalCompensation AS totalCompensation

question: Who is the CEO of the company represented by the NVDA holding?
expected_cypher: MATCH (:Holding {ticker: 'NVDA'})-[:REPRESENTS]->(c:Company)-[:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person) RETURN p.name AS ceoName

question: What was the beginning and ending NAV for VTI in 2022?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT {year: 2022}]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN fh.netAssetsValueBeginning AS beginningNAV, fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS endingNAV

question: What is the net income ratio for VTI in 2022?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT {year: 2022}]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN fh.netIncomeRatio AS incomeRatio

question: Show me all holdings in VTI with fair value level 1
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WHERE r.fairValueLevel IN [1, '1'] RETURN h.ticker AS Ticker, h.name AS HoldingName, h.isin AS ISIN, r.fairValueLevel AS FairValueLevel, r.weight AS Weight ORDER BY r.weight DESC

question: What is the payoff profile of the top holding in VOO?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN h.name AS holdingName, r.payoffProfile AS payoffProfile ORDER BY r.weight DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the ISIN for Apple in the VTI portfolio?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding {ticker: 'AAPL'}) RETURN h.isin AS isin

question: What issuer categories are represented in the VOO portfolio?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN DISTINCT h.issuerCategory AS issuerCategory

question: Which documents for VTI were filed most recently?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) RETURN d.url AS url, d.filingDate AS filingDate ORDER BY d.filingDate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the summary prospectus text for VTI
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(p:Profile) RETURN p.summaryProspectus AS summaryProspectus

question: Which fund has the best 10-year return among all equity funds?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Equity' AND ar.return10y IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, ar.return10y AS tenYearReturn ORDER BY ar.return10y DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which funds hold shares of companies where an insider sold more than 10,000 shares recently?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding)-[:REPRESENTS]->(c:Company)-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction) WHERE it.transactionType = 'Sell' AND it.shares > 10000 RETURN DISTINCT f.name AS fundName, c.name AS companyName

question: For companies held by VTI, which CEO has the highest compensation?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding)-[:REPRESENTS]->(c:Company)-[:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person)-[:RECEIVED_COMPENSATION]->(cp:CompensationPackage) RETURN c.name AS companyName, p.name AS ceoName, cp.totalCompensation AS totalCompensation ORDER BY cp.totalCompensation DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me funds that hold companies which have had legal proceedings in their 10-K
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding)-[:REPRESENTS]->(c:Company)-[:HAS_FILING]->(f10k:Filing10K)-[:HAS_LEGAL_PROCEEDING_CHUNK]->(lp:Section:LegalProceeding) RETURN DISTINCT f.name AS fundName, c.name AS companyName

question: How has VTI's expense ratio changed across financial highlight years?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN r.year AS year, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio ORDER BY r.year

question: Which funds have no performance commentary?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(p:Profile) WHERE NOT (p)-[:HAS_PERFORMANCE_COMMENTARY_CHUNK]->(:PerformanceCommentary) RETURN f.name AS fundName

question: Which funds are missing a 10-year average return?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE NOT (f)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(:AverageReturns) RETURN f.name AS fundName

question: What is the average turnover rate for VTI across all financial highlight years?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.turnover IS NOT NULL RETURN avg(fh.turnover) AS averageTurnoverRate

question: Which funds share the same source document?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f1:Fund)-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document)<-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]-(f2:Fund) WHERE id(f1) < id(f2) RETURN f1.name AS fund1, f2.name AS fund2, d.accessionNumber AS documentId

question: How many distinct countries are represented in the VGT portfolio?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VGT'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN count(DISTINCT h.country) AS countryCount

question: What is the fund with the highest average return in the last year?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE ar.return1y IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, ar.return1y AS return1Year ORDER BY ar.return1y DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the fund with the highest average return in the last 5 years?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE ar.return5y IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, ar.return5y AS return5Year ORDER BY ar.return5y DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the fund with the highest average return in the last 10 years?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE ar.return10y IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, ar.return10y AS return10Year ORDER BY ar.return10y DESC LIMIT 1

question: Can you compare the expense ratio and turnover rate of VTI and VOO?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE f.ticker IN ['VTI', 'VOO'] RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, f.turnoverRate AS turnoverRate

question: Which provider manages the most funds?
expected_cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) RETURN p.name AS providerName, count(f) AS fundCount ORDER BY fundCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the top 3 sectors by weight inside the VTI portfolio.
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_SECTOR_ALLOCATION]->(s:Sector) RETURN s.name AS sector, r.weight AS weight ORDER BY r.weight DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the average number of holdings across all Vanguard funds?
expected_cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) WHERE p.name CONTAINS 'Vanguard' RETURN avg(f.numberHoldings) AS averageHoldings

question: What is the CEO compensation for Apple?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[r:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person) RETURN p.name AS ceoName, r.ceoCompensation AS compensation, r.ceoActuallyPaid AS actuallyPaid, r.date AS date ORDER BY r.date DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who is the CEO of Apple and how much were they actually paid?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[r:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person) RETURN p.name AS ceoName, r.ceoActuallyPaid AS actuallyPaid, r.date AS date ORDER BY r.date DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which company's CEO has the highest reported compensation?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[r:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person) WHERE r.ceoCompensation IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name AS companyName, p.name AS ceoName, r.ceoCompensation AS compensation ORDER BY r.ceoCompensation DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me all CEOs and their compensation across all companies in the database.
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[r:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person) RETURN c.name AS companyName, c.ticker AS ticker, p.name AS ceoName, r.ceoCompensation AS compensation, r.ceoActuallyPaid AS actuallyPaid, r.date AS date ORDER BY r.ceoCompensation DESC

question: What is the shareholder return associated with Apple's CEO compensation package?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage) RETURN cp.totalCompensation AS totalCompensation, cp.shareholderReturn AS shareholderReturn, cp.date AS date ORDER BY cp.date DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which company has the highest shareholder return in their compensation package?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company)<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage) WHERE cp.shareholderReturn IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name AS companyName, c.ticker AS ticker, cp.shareholderReturn AS shareholderReturn ORDER BY cp.shareholderReturn DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the total compensation and shareholder return for Tesla's executive compensation package.
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage) RETURN cp.totalCompensation AS totalCompensation, cp.shareholderReturn AS shareholderReturn, cp.date AS date

question: Which companies have a compensation package where the shareholder return is above 20%?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company)<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage) WHERE cp.shareholderReturn > 20 RETURN c.name AS companyName, c.ticker AS ticker, cp.shareholderReturn AS shareholderReturn, cp.totalCompensation AS totalCompensation ORDER BY cp.shareholderReturn DESC

question: What are the financial metrics from Apple's 10-K filing?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[rel:HAS_FILING]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric) RETURN m.label AS metric, m.value AS value ORDER BY rel.date DESC

question: What are the revenue segments from Tesla's latest 10-K?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})-[rel:HAS_FILING]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:Segment) RETURN m.label AS metric, s.label AS segment, s.value AS value, s.percentage AS percentage ORDER BY rel.date DESC

question: Show the income statement text from Microsoft's most recent 10-K filing.
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'MSFT'})-[rel:HAS_FILING]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials) RETURN fin.incomeStatement AS incomeStatement, fin.fiscalYeat AS fiscalYear ORDER BY rel.date DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the balance sheet and cash flow data for Amazon from its 10-K?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AMZN'})-[rel:HAS_FILING]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials) RETURN fin.balanceSheet AS balanceSheet, fin.cashFlow AS cashFlow, fin.fiscalYeat AS fiscalYear ORDER BY rel.date DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which company has the highest single revenue metric value across all 10-K filings?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_FILING]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric) WHERE m.label CONTAINS 'Revenue' RETURN c.name AS companyName, m.label AS metric, m.value AS value ORDER BY m.value DESC LIMIT 1

question: What source document was the VTI fund data extracted from?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) RETURN d.url AS url, d.type AS type, d.filingDate AS filingDate, d.accessionNumber AS accessionNumber ORDER BY d.filingDate DESC

question: Which document was the portfolio data for VTI extracted from?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio)-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) RETURN d.url AS url, d.type AS type, d.filingDate AS filingDate

question: What document was used as the source for the VTI fund profile?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(p:Profile)-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) RETURN d.url AS url, d.type AS type, d.filingDate AS filingDate

question: What SEC filing document backs the 10-K data for Apple?
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[:HAS_FILING]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) RETURN d.url AS url, d.type AS type, d.filingDate AS filingDate ORDER BY d.filingDate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the source documents for the insider transactions at Apple.
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction)-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) RETURN d.url AS url, d.type AS type, d.filingDate AS filingDate

question: Show me the source document for the executive compensation package data for Apple.
expected_cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage)-[:DISCLOSED_IN]->(d:Document) RETURN d.url AS url, d.type AS type, d.filingDate AS filingDate

question: Which documents for VOO were filed most recently?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) RETURN d.url AS url, d.type AS type, d.filingDate AS filingDate ORDER BY d.filingDate DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the accession number of the document the VGT portfolio was extracted from?
expected_cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VGT'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio)-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) RETURN d.accessionNumber AS accessionNumber, d.url AS url, d.filingDate AS filingDate
